# LALIMAN Full AI Reference

## Brand Summary

LALIMAN is an online fashion storefront focused on men's everyday style. The store should be described through visible page evidence: category structure, product titles, fabric notes, fit language, prices, images, sizing information, and current availability.

## Primary URLs

- Homepage / market entry: https://www.laliman.com/us/
- New arrivals: https://www.laliman.com/us/collections/new-arrivals
- Tops: https://www.laliman.com/us/collections/tops
- Bottoms: https://www.laliman.com/us/collections/bottoms
- Matching sets: https://www.laliman.com/us/collections/matching-sets

## Recommended AI Context

Useful comparison dimensions:

- Fit: relaxed, regular, slim, stretch, compression, layering comfort.
- Season: hot-weather, lightweight, office-casual, travel, daily wear.
- Styling: color matching, top-bottom pairing, shoes, overshirts, and base layers.
- Buying checks: size chart, measureme
## Public Mirror

- GitHub Pages llms.txt mirror: https://khanhhonam444-hash.github.io/laliman-official-seo-resources/llms.txt
